items.name: Python-compiler-
items.description: A blazing-fast, ahead-of-time (AOT) Python compiler written completely from scratch.  Unlike other tools that simply package the Python interpreter (like PyInstaller) or transpile code to C (like Nuitka), this compiler parses pure Python code and directly generates native machine code (binary) for x86_64 and ARM64 architectures.

items.name: NYX
items.description: Project Nyx is a Unified Ring-0 WebAssembly Composable Unikernel. It embeds a Wasm VM directly inside the Linux kernel, using eBPF TCX for zero-copy network steering and LSM hooks for zero-trust security. By bypassing Ring-3 context switches, it achieves blazing-fast, bare-metal microservice execution within a mathematically secure sandbox.
